label: Tokenized Treasury
blurb: On-chain wrappers of sovereign debt instruments — typically short-duration T-bills.

label: Tokenized Money Market
blurb: Tokenized shares of regulated money market funds.

label: Tokenized Commodity
blurb: Claims on physical commodities (gold, silver) held by licensed custodians.

label: Tokenized Private Credit
blurb: On-chain exposure to private lending pools and structured credit.

label: Tokenized Real Estate
blurb: Fractionalized claims on real property cash flows or equity.

label: Tokenized Equity
blurb: Tokenized representations of public or private equity.

label: Other
blurb: RWA structures not fitting the standard categories.
